name: tangub-city-hardware-pos
description: Offline-first POS system for Tangub City Hardware

scripts.install:all: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend:install && npm run electron:install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run electron:dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.build:all: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build:all && cd electron && npm run build:win
scripts.electron:publish:win: npm run build:all && cd electron && npm run publish:win
